inputs.label: Speed in Mbps
inputs.businessContext: Measured or nominal data rate in megabits per second.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion: 1 Gbps = 1000 Mbps. Adjust for non-standard units.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Output precision in decimal places for reporting consistency.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset (Mbps)
inputs.businessContext: Calibration correction value added to the input. Typically 0 for uncalibrated readings.

inputs.label: Measurement ID
inputs.businessContext: For traceability to measurement records, set to 0 if not applicable.

formulas.primaryGbps: Math.round(((mbpsValue + calibrationOffset) / conversionFactor) * Math.pow(10, decimalPrecision)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPrecision)
